name: Spirited Away
description: The vast night sky stretches infinitely, a shimmering expanse of stars scattered like diamonds on velvet. Haku, in his majestic dragon form, soars through the cool, open air, his iridescent scales catching the moonlight with every graceful movement. His long, sinuous body weaves through the night like a river in the sky, exuding both power and serenity.
creator: DillerFiller
